purpose: mfe-ui-kit paketinin kanonik component registry kaynagi; export gercegi, planned backlog ve preview davranisi buradan yonetilir.

items.name: AgGridServer
items.description: Server-side AG Grid wrapperi; standard options ve overlay davranisini toplar.

items.name: AnchorToc
items.description: AnchorToc primitivei; uzun sayfa, policy ve docs-site akislari icin derin link ve aktif heading navigation davranisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Avatar
items.description: Identity primitivei; image, initials ve fallback icon davranisini gizlilik varsayimlariyla sunar.

items.name: Badge
items.description: Durum, sayi ve kisa sinyal gosteren hafif etiket bileşeni.

items.name: Breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb primitivei; route-aware yol izi, collapse ve current-page davranisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Button
items.description: Temel aksiyon primitivei; varyant, boyut, loading ve icon slot davranisini tek token zincirinde toplar.

items.name: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox primitivei; helper, validation, readonly/disabled ve indeterminate davranisini ortak boolean-control shell ile sunar.

items.name: CommandPalette
items.description: CommandPalette P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: ContextMenu
items.description: ContextMenu P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: DatePicker
items.description: DatePicker primitivei; milestone, release ve tarih secim akislari icin access-aware date entry yuzeyi sunar.

items.name: Descriptions
items.description: Key-value detail primitivei; owner, scope, risk ve status ozetlerini kolon bazli layout ile gosterir.

items.name: DetailDrawer
items.description: Kayit detay ve sekmeli inceleme akislari icin ortak drawer yapisi.

items.name: Divider
items.description: Separation primitivei; horizontal, vertical ve labelled divider davranisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Dropdown
items.description: Kebab ve context action menu ihtiyacini kapsayan acilir menu primitivei.

items.name: Empty
items.description: Bos durum ve no-data ekranlari icin ortak fallback yuzeyi.

items.name: EntityGridTemplate
items.description: ERP liste ekranlari icin ana grid kompoziti.

items.name: FilterBar
items.description: Liste ve grid filtreleme aksiyonlari icin ortak toolbar satiri.

items.name: FormDrawer
items.description: Form odakli side-panel akislari icin standart drawer yapisi.

items.name: IconButton
items.description: Icon-only aksiyon primitivei; accessible name, selected state ve size kontratini Button ile hizali verir.

items.name: JsonViewer
items.description: JsonViewer P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: LinkInline
items.description: Inline link primitivei; internal, external ve current-state davranisini ortak API ile verir.

items.name: List
items.description: List P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: Modal
items.description: Dialog ve confirm akislari icin token zincirine bagli overlay primitivei.

items.name: PageLayout
items.description: Route seviyesinde baslik, breadcrumb, actions ve detail alanlarini standardize eder.

items.name: Pagination
items.description: Pagination primitivei; server/client modlari, compact sayfalama ve bilgi yogun dataset gezintisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Popover
items.description: Popover P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: Radio
items.description: Radio primitivei; tek secimli tercih, helper, validation ve access-aware interaction davranisini ortak boolean-control shell ile sunar.

items.name: ReportFilterPanel
items.description: Rapor filtreleri ve submit/reset aksiyonlarini tek panelde toplar.

items.name: Select
items.description: Temel secim ve dropdown alanlarini ortak stil ve access guard ile sunar.

items.name: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder primitivei; text, avatar ve card skeleton varyantlarini token-first sunar.

items.name: Slider
items.description: Slider primitivei; density, threshold ve progress tuning icin access-aware range secimi sunar.

items.name: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator primitivei; inline, block ve overlay modlarini ortak semantikle verir.

items.name: Steps
items.description: Steps primitivei; cok adimli wizard ve release progress akislari icin status-rich navigation katmani sunar.

items.name: Switch
items.description: Switch primitivei; release, visibility ve policy toggles icin access-aware, validation-ready boolean gecis davranisi sunar.

items.name: THEME_APPEARANCE_OPTIONS
items.description: THEME_APPEARANCE_OPTIONS için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: THEME_DENSITY_OPTIONS
items.description: THEME_DENSITY_OPTIONS için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: THEME_ELEVATION_OPTIONS
items.description: THEME_ELEVATION_OPTIONS için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: THEME_MOTION_OPTIONS
items.description: THEME_MOTION_OPTIONS için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: THEME_RADIUS_OPTIONS
items.description: THEME_RADIUS_OPTIONS için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: TableSimple
items.description: Hafif veri tablosu primitivei; loading, empty, sticky header ve density davranisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Tabs
items.description: Tabs navigation primitivei; controlled/uncontrolled state, keyboard navigation ve token-first tablist davranisini tek API ile sunar.

items.name: Tag
items.description: Kategori, statü ve filtre sinyalleri icin kullanılan kapsul etiket.

items.name: Text
items.description: Tipografi primitivei; semantic preset, tone, clamp/truncate ve mono davranisini tek API ile verir.

items.name: TextArea
items.description: TextArea primitivei; long-form text entry, auto-resize, inline guidance ve validation davranisini ortak field shell ile sunar.

items.name: TextInput
items.description: TextInput primitivei; label, helper, error, count ve access-aware text entry davranisini ortak field shell ile sunar.

items.name: ThemePreviewCard
items.description: Tema varyasyonlarini minik kartlar halinde karsilastiran preview primitivei.

items.name: TimePicker
items.description: TimePicker primitivei; rollout, cutover ve maintenance pencere saatlerini access-aware time entry yuzeyi ile sunar.

items.name: Tooltip
items.description: Native title tabanli hafif yardim metni primitivei.

items.name: TourCoachmarks
items.description: TourCoachmarks P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: Tree
items.description: Tree P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: TreeTable
items.description: TreeTable P2 backlog girdisi; export ancak implementation + preview tamamlandiginda acilir.

items.name: Upload
items.description: Upload primitivei; kanit, ek ve release paketlerini policy-aware file selection yuzeyi ile toplar.

items.name: buildAuthHeaders
items.description: Shared auth token resolver zincirinden header üreten helper.

items.name: buildEntityGridQueryParams
items.description: Grid state bilgisini backend query param’lerine ceviren helper.

items.name: getResolvedToken
items.description: getResolvedToken için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: getThemeAxes
items.description: Aktif theme axes değerlerini okur.

items.name: getThemeContract
items.description: Aktif semantic theme contract bilgisini okur.

items.name: registerTokenResolver
items.description: registerTokenResolver için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: resetTokenResolver
items.description: resetTokenResolver için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: resolveAccessState
items.description: Permission/access seviyesini render davranisina cevirir.

items.name: resolveThemeModeKey
items.description: resolveThemeModeKey için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setAppearance
items.description: setAppearance için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setDensity
items.description: setDensity için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setElevation
items.description: setElevation için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setMotion
items.description: setMotion için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setOverlayIntensity
items.description: setOverlayIntensity için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setOverlayOpacity
items.description: setOverlayOpacity için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setRadius
items.description: setRadius için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setSurfaceTone
items.description: setSurfaceTone için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: setTableSurfaceTone
items.description: setTableSurfaceTone için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: shouldBlockInteraction
items.description: shouldBlockInteraction için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: subscribeThemeAxes
items.description: subscribeThemeAxes için kanonik katalog girdisi.

items.name: toggleVariantDefault
items.description: Grid default varyantini belirleyen utility.

items.name: updateThemeAxes
items.description: Theme axes patch uygulayan runtime controller.

items.name: useGridVariants
items.description: Grid varyantlarini kullanip durum yoneten hook.

items.name: withAccessGuard
items.description: Readonly/disabled guard davranisini event handler seviyesinde uygular.
